# terrible_community_general_mksysb (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Backup name.
- `storage_path` (String) Storage path where the mksysb backup is stored.

### Optional

- `backup_crypt_files` (Boolean) Backup encrypted files.
- `backup_dmapi_fs` (Boolean) Back up DMAPI filesystem files.
- `create_map_files` (Boolean) Creates a new MAP files.
- `exclude_files` (Boolean) Excludes files using `/etc/rootvg.exclude`.
- `exclude_wpar_files` (Boolean) Excludes WPAR files.
- `extended_attrs` (Boolean) Backup extended attributes.
- `new_image_data` (Boolean) Creates a new file data.
- `software_packing` (Boolean) Exclude files from packing option listed in `/etc/exclude_packing.rootvg`.
- `use_snapshot` (Boolean) Creates backup using snapshots.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) Return message regarding the action.
